workflow.name: Puber Smoke Test
workflow.description: Run focused Puber Android TV smoke tests, optionally fix approved findings, and clean up safely.

transition_groups.description: Start focused device smoke test from the task body.
Smoke test found an actionable issue; user approval required before fixing.
Smoke test passed or is accepted; run mandatory compliance review before cleanup.
Smoke test is blocked by missing device, MCP, build, credentials, or navigation context.
Fix was applied; re-run the focused smoke test.
Cleanup report is ready; finish the task.
Compliance review passed; create or update the task pull request before cleanup.
Compliance review found smoke-process violations; user approval required before rework.
Compliance review is blocked by missing or contradictory required sources.
PR exists; monitor GitHub checks when available.
PR is intentionally not applicable because there are no repository changes; run cleanup.
PR creation or update is blocked by git state, auth, remote, branch, or unsafe repository state.
PR checks passed or are intentionally skipped; run conservative cleanup.
PR checks failed due to task changes; user approval required before fixes.
CI monitoring is blocked by GitHub access, missing check data, or unsafe repository state.

edges.prompt_template:
Run the Puber smoke-test flow for this Kent task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/smoke-test.md. Treat the task body as the target feature/screen and device notes. Follow AGENTS.md MCP Mobile Testing rules: always install a fresh devDebug APK immediately before device testing, force-stop the app, and launch com.kino.puber.stage/com.kino.puber.MainActivity. Do this even if the task/user says the app is already running. Prefer UI tree/assertions over screenshots, and save artifacts only for issues.

Do not edit production code in this smoke node. Complete with done if the smoke test passes or is accepted. Complete with needs_changes if you found an actionable app issue and provide smoke_report, reproduction_steps, and artifacts_path. Complete with blocked if device/MCP/build/access is unavailable and provide blocker_reason.

Fix the approved Puber smoke-test finding.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Apply the smallest robust fix for {{.Params.smoke_report}}. Verify with focused Gradle/test commands and, if practical, the reproduction steps {{.Params.reproduction_steps}}. Use ./tools/agentw in .kent/worktrees and ./gradlew in the main checkout.

Complete with smoke and provide fix_report, changed_files, and verification_summary. Complete with blocked if unsafe or missing input and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Smoke test findings and expected versus actual behavior.
Steps to reproduce the smoke-test finding.
Path to saved smoke-test artifacts, or none if no artifacts were captured.

edges.prompt_template:
Run mandatory Puber Compliance Review before cleanup.

Read .kent/commands/compliance-review.md, .kent/commands/smoke-test.md, .kent/project-contract.md, and AGENTS.md first. Reviewed scope: completed smoke-test work product and process. Verify compliance with mandatory fresh devDebug install/restart, MCP testing rules, task requirements, and workflow contract. Do not edit files.

Complete with done and provide compliance_report when no compliance violations are found. Complete with needs_changes and provide compliance_report when smoke rework is required. Complete with blocked and provide blocker_reason if required sources are missing or contradictory.

parameters.description: Why smoke testing cannot continue, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Re-run the focused Puber smoke test after the fix.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Use {{.Params.fix_report}} and {{.Params.verification_summary}} as context. Follow .kent/commands/smoke-test.md and AGENTS.md MCP rules. Do not edit files in this node. Complete with done, needs_changes, or blocked.

parameters.description: Summary of the smoke finding fix.
Files changed by the smoke finding fix.
Commands run by the fixer and their pass/fail results.
Why fixing cannot continue, in the task language when practical.
Summary of cleanup performed or deliberately skipped.

edges.prompt_template:
Create or update the Puber pull request for this completed task.

Read .kent/project-contract.md, .kent/commands/ship-pr.md, and AGENTS.md first. Compliance result: {{.Params.compliance_report}}.

If this task produced repository changes, commit only task-related files, push the current task branch to origin, and create or update a GitHub PR. Do not merge the PR. Do not push directly to master/main. If there are no repository changes and the task is report-only or smoke-only, complete with done and provide pr_report explaining why PR is not applicable.

Complete with monitor_ci when a PR exists and provide pr_url, branch_name, and workspace_path. Complete with done only for PR-not-applicable/no-diff cases and provide pr_report. Complete with blocked if PR creation/update cannot be completed safely and provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: Compliance review report, including rule sources checked and any findings.

edges.prompt_template:
Rework the Puber smoke test to resolve compliance findings only.

Read .kent/commands/compliance-review.md and .kent/commands/smoke-test.md first. Re-run or supplement smoke testing only as required by {{.Params.compliance_report}}. Always install a fresh devDebug APK before device testing. Do not edit production code in this node. Complete with done, needs_changes, or blocked according to the smoke workflow contract.

parameters.description: Compliance review report, including rule sources checked and any findings.
Why compliance review cannot complete, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Monitor Puber PR checks.

Read .kent/project-contract.md and AGENTS.md first. Inspect PR {{.Params.pr_url}} on branch {{.Params.branch_name}}. Use GitHub CLI when available. Do not merge the PR. Do not push new commits from this node.

Complete with done if CI/checks pass, are absent, or are intentionally skipped with a clear reason; provide ci_report and pr_url. Complete with needs_changes if CI failed due to task changes and provide workspace_path plus ci_report. Complete with blocked if checks cannot be inspected and the risk cannot be accepted; provide blocker_reason.

parameters.description: URL of the created or updated pull request.
Name of the pushed task branch.
Path to the task workspace or worktree used for PR creation.

edges.prompt_template:
Run conservative Puber task cleanup after PR was determined not applicable.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. PR report: {{.Params.pr_report}}. Do not delete any worktree containing unpushed or uncommitted user changes. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: Why no pull request was created or updated.
Why PR creation/update cannot complete, in the task language when practical.

edges.prompt_template:
Run conservative Puber task cleanup after PR/CI.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first, then use .kent/commands/cleanup-task.md. PR: {{.Params.pr_url}}. CI report: {{.Params.ci_report}}. Do not delete any worktree containing unpushed or uncommitted user changes. Complete with done and provide cleanup_report.

parameters.description: CI/check status report, including failures, skipped checks, or accepted absent checks.
URL of the created or updated pull request.

edges.prompt_template:
Fix Puber smoke-finding CI failures only.

Read .kent/project-contract.md first. Apply only the minimum changes required by CI report {{.Params.ci_report}}. Verify narrowly, then complete with smoke and provide fix_report, changed_files, and verification_summary. Complete with blocked and provide blocker_reason if unsafe or missing input.

parameters.description: Path to the task workspace or worktree used for PR creation.
CI/check status report, including failures, skipped checks, or accepted absent checks.
Why CI monitoring cannot complete, in the task language when practical.
